activeTasks.title: Re-run strategy optimizer (2nd attempt, PID=280077)
activeTasks.note: 1st attempt died at PEPE-USDT tick loading (likely OOM — 12 coins x 1.88M ticks). Runner re-dispatched at 05:34 with context about the failure. Watch for progress.

completed_this_cycle.title: Investigate zero-trade anomaly: ADA/OP/BOME/SHIB
completed_this_cycle.outcome: RESOLVED — not an anomaly. is_eligible() filter blocking 17-34% of bad strategy-coin pairs. Trades ARE being created for those symbols normally.
